headlines.title: Royal Navy helicopter crash 'deeply worrying' time for families, says PM
headlines.description: The Ministry of Defence says an investigation into the incident is under way.

headlines.title: Ukrainian drones hit St Petersburg as Putin's flagship economic forum opens
headlines.description: Several long-range drones struck oil storage facilities near the city, days before Vladimir Putin is due to address the event.

headlines.title: US and Iran launch new strikes, as Kuwait says airport hit by Iranian drones
headlines.description: Kuwait says one person is dead after drones hit civilian buildings including its international airport.

headlines.title: Giorgio Locatelli replaces John Torode as co-host of Celebrity MasterChef
headlines.description: The Italian restauranteur will join Grace Dent on the series, following Torode's exit last year.

headlines.title: How a content creator tried to use a YouTube alibi to get away with murder
headlines.description: Stephen McCullagh, 36, of Woodland Gardens in Lisburn, will serve at least 31 years in prison for the murder of his pregnant partner Natalie McNally.

headlines.title: Three-quarters of workers not on track for 'moderate' pension income, report suggests
headlines.description: A newly-published report suggests a moderate lifestyle in retirement costs £32,700 for one person and £45,400 for two.

headlines.title: Lloyds, Halifax and Bank of Scotland app users hit by outage
headlines.description: "We're aware some customers are having issues with our app and online banking. We're really sorry about this," Lloyds Bank posted on X.

headlines.title: British soldier killed in Iraq training exercise was 'devoted family-man'
headlines.description: Lance Corporal James Stewart Freeman, 29, died on Sunday during a joint training exercise in Erbil with the US

headlines.title: The 18 creatures in the running to be on the new banknotes
headlines.description: The Bank of England is asking the public which animals should appear on future banknotes.

headlines.title: Police sent personal details to the wrong person, says alleged Al Fayed victim
headlines.description: Joanna Brittan says notes about her alleged abuse were sent by the Met to another alleged victim in error.

headlines.title: Key moments of police bodycam footage before Henry Nowak's death
headlines.description: BBC Verify has analysed bodycam footage that was released by the police of Henry Nowak after being stabbed by Vickrum Digwa.

headlines.title: Can two hours of strength training a week reduce the risk of dying early?
headlines.description: Regular weight training can help you keep fit and strengthen muscles to live longer, research suggests.

headlines.title: Do you find yourself aimlessly scrolling? You're not alone
headlines.description: A Virgin Media O2 report suggests an average of 36% of time spent on phones is without a clear purpose.

headlines.title: We now know how Peter Murrell embezzled from the SNP - but not why
headlines.description: Details revealed in court show the persistence, cynicism and devious tactics used by the former chief executive.

headlines.title: Putin remains uncompromising on Ukraine, but is public discourse on war changing in Russia?
headlines.description: Russia is intensifying attacks in Ukraine but more than four years of war are causing concern even among Putin loyalists.

headlines.title: Sailors stressed and exhausted after months trapped by Strait of Hormuz blockade
headlines.description: The uncertainty has weighed heavily on the 20,000 seafarers trapped in the Iran war zone.

headlines.title: The anatomy of a Golden Boot winner - and who could win it in 2026
headlines.description: A look at the common attributes of World Cup Golden Boot winners and the claims of the leading 2026 candidates examined.

headlines.title: KSI tells Sidemen 'I'll always be here' after quitting YouTube group
headlines.description: The social media star has addressed his fellow Sidemen after leaving the YouTube collective.

headlines.title: Meta workers can opt out of being tracked at work - but only for half an hour at a time
headlines.description: According to an internal memo, new controls will allow employees to pause the data collection for "up to 30 minutes at a time".

headlines.title: Martin Scorsese gets backlash after endorsing 'creatively freeing' AI
headlines.description: AI can help directors "move faster without sacrificing quality or craft" in pre-production, he says.

headlines.title: Trump administration drops $1.8bn 'compensation fund'
headlines.description: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche's announcement to abandon the fund comes amid pushback from top Republican lawmakers.

headlines.title: Paralympic champion backs plans to fine airlines which fail disabled travellers
headlines.description: The Paralympic champion said an airline staff member once asked her if she had "ever tried to walk".

headlines.title: Celine Dion 'heartbroken' by death of Beauty and the Beast singer Peabo Bryson
headlines.description: Bryson was best known as the voice behind Disney songs like A Whole New World and Beauty and the Beast.

headlines.title: Alleged victim tells Donaldson trial she should have reported abuse claims earlier
headlines.description: Sir Jeffrey Donaldson, the former DUP leader, is on trial for 18 sex abuse charges, including one count of rape, all of which he denies.

headlines.title: BBC News app
headlines.description: Top stories, breaking news, live reporting, and follow news topics that match your interests

headlines.title: Why Was Henry Nowak Handcuffed By Police As He Lay Dying?
headlines.description: Starmer says he 'felt sick' watching footage of Henry Nowak's arrest.

headlines.title: Does the US need new laws to protect elections?
headlines.description: And, why does Donald Trump want to “nationalise” elections?

headlines.title: The anatomy of a Golden Boot winner - and who could win it in 2026?
headlines.description: A look at the common attributes of World Cup Golden Boot winners and the claims of the leading 2026 candidates examined.

headlines.title: Scott poised to make England debut in World Cup friendlies
headlines.description: Bournemouth midfielder Alex Scott is poised to make his England debut in the forthcoming World Cup warm-up games in the United States.

headlines.title: Leclerc agrees new long-term deal with Ferrari
headlines.description: Ferrari driver Charles Leclerc agrees a new long-term deal ahead of this weekend's Monaco Grand Prix.

headlines.title: Qualifier Chwalinska reaches semi-finals to continue dream French Open run
headlines.description: Qualifier Maja Chwalinska continued her dream French Open run as she beats Anna Kalinskaya to reach her first Grand Slam semi-final.

headlines.title: Man Utd agree £35m fee for Atalanta's Ederson
headlines.description: Atalanta's Brazilian midfielder Ederson is set to become Michael Carrick's first signing after Manchester United agreed a £35m deal for the 26-year-old

headlines.title: Back shaving & biggest posers - the Scotland squad in their own words
headlines.description: John McGinn packed an European plug adaptor. Lyndon Dykes follows Ryan Christie around like a dog. Liam Kelly shaves Grant Hanley's back. Often.
